---
title: Theme Overview

  author: Trellis
---

Trellis includes custom theme components that provide a customized look and improved UX out of the box.

## Custom Components

Trellis uses fully custom theme components. This gives complete control over every aspect of rendering — from where the last-updated date appears to what icons admonitions use.

## What's Customized

The significant customizations are:

| Area | What changed | Details |
|------|-------------|---------|
| [Last Updated](/theme/last-updated/) | Date moved to page top | Appears right below the title instead of at the bottom |
| [Heading Anchors](/theme/heading-anchors/) | Copy-to-clipboard | Click the link icon to copy the heading URL |
| [Tabs](/theme/tabs/) | URL sync + pill styling | Tab selection saved to URL query params, pill-style design |
| [Admonitions](/theme/admonitions/) | Custom SVG icons | Each type (note, tip, info, caution, danger) has a unique icon |
| Sidebar | Enhanced styling | Accent colors, hover states, active indicators via CSS tokens |
| Dark mode | Default to dark | Ships with dark mode as default, respects system preference |

## Directory Structure

```
components/docs/
├── mdx/
│   ├── index.tsx            # MDX component registry
│   ├── callout.tsx          # Admonitions (note, tip, info, caution, danger) with custom SVG icons
│   ├── code-block.tsx       # Shiki syntax highlighting (server component)
│   ├── code-block-client.tsx # Copy button + word wrap toggle (client component)
│   ├── heading.tsx          # Heading anchors with copy-to-clipboard
│   ├── tabs.tsx             # Pill-style tabs with URL sync
│   ├── image-lightbox.tsx   # Click-to-zoom image modal
│   └── mermaid.tsx          # Mermaid diagram renderer with pan/zoom
├── search/
│   └── search-dialog.tsx    # Cmd+K search modal (Fuse.js)
├── navbar.tsx               # Top navbar + mobile sidebar drawer
├── sidebar.tsx              # Desktop sidebar with collapsible categories
├── breadcrumbs.tsx          # Breadcrumb navigation
├── toc.tsx                  # Table of contents (right sidebar)
└── footer.tsx               # Site footer
```

## Modifying Theme Components

To customize a component, edit it directly in `components/docs/`.

:::tip
Before making changes, read the existing component code to understand what it does.
:::

:::caution
Since these are custom components, they are maintained within the Trellis project. When upgrading Next.js, check for any breaking changes that may affect theme components.
:::
